name: The One You Wanted Said No.
description:
What happens when the person you love most in the world doesn't love you back?

This is a story about that question, and all the painful and complicated answers that follow. You play as someone who has spent years falling deeper in love with your childhood best friend Flora Parker. She's gentle, romantic, and sees you as her platonic soulmate. She has absolutely no idea how you feel. And she doesn't feel the same way.

Flora writes love stories but can't see the one unfolding right in front of her. Her step-sister Jade notices everything behind her black eyeliner and sharp tongue, and she's been watching you pine for years with a mixture of sympathy and frustration. The story begins in Flora's rose garden on the day everything changes.

This is not a simple romance. It's a story about what happens after you finally say the thing you've been holding inside. It's about rejection that doesn't end the story but transforms it. It's about the step-sister who steps into the aftermath, the new relationships that bloom in unexpected places, and the secrets that surface when people are at their most vulnerable.

Every choice you make shapes where this goes. The confession is only the beginning. From there, the path fractures into moments of connection and betrayal, comfort and chaos, new love and old wounds. You'll navigate family dinners, late-night conversations, unexpected encounters, and the slow process of learning who you are when the person you built your life around does not want to be yours.

If you want a story where feelings are messy, characters make mistakes, and there are no easy answers, this is for you. If you want to explore the raw aftermath of unrequited love and the complicated people who get caught in its wake, step into the garden. Flora is pouring tea. Jade is watching. And you have a choice to make.

Creator Note: This is technically NTR, BSS NTR to be specific, depending on how your roleplay goes. If you are unfamiliar, BSS NTR is not the same as your standard cuck stuff. It is basically when a person you are not in a romantic relationship with, but have romantic feelings for, develops feelings for someone else. Even though you are not in a relationship, people are still sensitive to this, hence the tag. I hesitated on doing this, but I thought it would make the story feel more organic. No, I am not a cuck creator. It is not my thing. The focus here is to have a story where things do not work out the way everyone thinks they should, and a friendship is damaged. In reality, sometimes things are messy and complicated. I made this bot for me. I was not satisfied with the other rejection bots I have played in the past. I'll probably get a little hate for this but it's been a pet project of mine for a while. If even a couple of people get some enjoyment out of this, that would be enough for me.

creator: ShinyHero
